name: Old Fashioned Coconut Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, brown sugar, granulated sugar, and egg until well combined.
2. Add flour, old mill oats, wheat germ, coconut, baking powder, and baking soda to the butter mixture. Mix until a dough forms.
3. Fold in chocolate chips or raisins.
4. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto lightly greased baking sheets.
5. Flatten each cookie slightly with a floured fork.
6. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
